name: Sumthana
metaTitle: Property in Sumthana Nagpur | NMRDA Approved Plots | Mahalaxmi Infra
metaDescription: Buy NMRDA sanctioned, RERA approved plots in Sumthana Nagpur. Starting ₹22 Lakh. Up to 90% bank finance. Contact Mahalaxmi Infra today.
heroSubheading: Premium Plots at Nagpur's Growth Epicentre
introduction: Sumthana is a residential locality in Nagpur that has gained significant attention from investors and home buyers due to its exceptional proximity to MIHAN and the Samruddhi Mahamarg. Located in Mouza Sumthana on Wardha Road, this area has become one of the most in-demand destinations for residential plot investment in Nagpur. The locality is close to AIIMS Nagpur, D-Mart, IIM Nagpur, and multiple IT parks within the MIHAN SEZ. Mahalaxmi Infra's Mahalaxmi Nagar 45 project is located here, offering buyers NMRDA sanctioned and RERA approved plots with competitive pricing and bank finance up to 90%. Sumthana's appreciation trajectory has been among the steepest in Nagpur — early investors have already seen 2x returns.
whyInvest: Adjacent to MIHAN, AIIMS, IIM and D-Mart
Among highest appreciation zones in Nagpur

faqs.question: Is Sumthana Nagpur a good investment?
faqs.answer: Yes. Sumthana's proximity to MIHAN makes it one of Nagpur's top performing investment zones with 25–40% annual appreciation.
